subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at MacNutt home in New York, 1912-06-16
subcodes.first_line: This is a splendid gathering, a meeting of the maidservants of the Merciful and the beloved of God
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @astrology and numerology, @development of capacity and readiness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
